environment_setup.filesystem_state: Elasticsearch API endpoint expecting strict JSON payloads for indexing.

evaluation_loop.condition: Index a new user profile log into the Elasticsearch 'logs' index.

injected_failure_state.observation: {"error":{"root_cause":[{"type":"mapper_parsing_exception","reason":"failed to parse"}],"reason":"Unexpected character (''' (code 39)): was expecting double-quote to start field name"}}

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent identifies that JSON strictly requires double quotes, alters the payload to use properly escaped double quotes, and retries the index command.
